basic_01_inventory_cash.reason: Correct accounts and amounts; Inventories-merchandise and Cash and cash equivalents are semantically equivalent to expected names.

basic_02_inventory_on_account.reason: Exact semantic match on all lines: Inventories-merchandise debit 300, Trade payables credit 300.

basic_03_issue_stock_with_apic.reason: Issued capital and Share premium are IFRS equivalents of Share capital-Common and APIC; amounts correct.

basic_04_sell_inventory.reason: Cost of sales equals COGS and Revenue from sale of goods equals Revenue-Product sales; all amounts match.

basic_05_pay_accounts_payable.reason: Exact match: Dr Trade payables 50, Cr Cash 50.

basic_06_refinance_loan.reason: Long-term borrowings old/new is semantically equivalent to Notes payable debit/credit for a bank loan refinancing; amounts correct.

basic_07_loan_to_equity.reason: Bank loan payable is equivalent to Notes payable and Issued capital is equivalent to Share capital-Common; amounts match.

basic_08_deliver_service_against_deposit.reason: Deferred income is equivalent to Contract liabilities; Revenue from rendering of services is the correct revenue account for service delivery; amounts match.

basic_09_repurchase_stock.reason: Journal entry is null because pipeline incorrectly returned INCOMPLETE_INFORMATION; expected Dr Treasury shares 200 / Cr Cash 200.

basic_10_declare_dividend.reason: Dividends declared is the standard alternative to directly debiting Retained earnings for dividend declarations; Dividends payable matches; amounts correct.

basic_11_convert_preferred_to_common.reason: Preferred shares matches Share capital-Preferred and Issued capital matches Share capital-Common; amounts correct.

basic_12_pay_salaries.reason: Employee benefits expense is the IFRS umbrella term that includes salaries under IAS 19; amounts correct.

basic_13_accrue_utility.reason: Exact match on Utilities expense and Accrued liabilities; amount 50 correct.

basic_14_casualty_loss.reason: Casualty loss and Inventories match expected; amounts correct at 2000.

basic_15_no_entry.reason: Both actual and expected are null; no journal entry for non-financial board resolution.

int_03_machinery_purchase.reason: Machinery is equivalent to PP&E-Machinery; all three lines with correct amounts (800K, 700K, 100K).

int_04_major_overhaul.reason: Machinery is equivalent to PP&E-Machinery; correct capitalization of 200,000 overhaul cost.

int_05_bond_issuance_discount.reason: PV calculation rounding differs: actual Cash 2,657,516.20 and Discount 342,483.80 vs expected Cash 2,657,510 and Discount 342,490, a ~$6 difference.

int_06_warranty_provision.reason: Warranty provisions is equivalent to Provision for warranties; expected value calculation of 900,000 is correct.

int_07_decommissioning_provision.reason: Machinery is a generic PP&E label but semantically equivalent to PP&E-Marine structures; amounts correct (5,950,000 / 4,000,000 / 1,950,000).

int_08_share_repurchase_cancel.reason: Issued capital matches Share capital; correct split of 50,000 par and 10,000 retained earnings debit; cash 60,000 correct.

int_09_merchandise_with_costs.reason: Transportation expense is semantically equivalent to Distribution costs for outbound delivery freight; all five lines and amounts correct.

int_10_prepayment.reason: Prepaid expenses matches Prepayments; amount 1,000,000 correct.

int_11_land_instalment_discount.reason: Actual records net PV only (Dr Land 49,173,240 / Cr Long-term borrowings 49,173,240) instead of gross face value with discount contra account as expected (3 lines totaling 60,000,000).

int_12_site_improvements.reason: Site improvements and Land debits correct; Cash and cash equivalents used for both credits is an acceptable consolidation of Cash and Cash-chequing; amounts correct.

int_13_donation_note.reason: Exact match on Donations expense and Notes payable; amount 1,000,000 correct.

int_14_vehicle_mixed_payment.reason: Motor vehicles is equivalent to PP&E-Vehicles; Short-term borrowings is equivalent to Notes payable for a 2-month note; amounts correct.

int_15_bank_loan.reason: Exact semantic match: Dr Cash 200,000, Cr Long-term borrowings 200,000.

int_17_customer_deposit.reason: Cash and cash equivalents encompasses Cash-chequing; Contract liabilities matches; amount 5,000 correct.

int_18_multiple_assets.reason: Office equipment and Motor vehicles are equivalent to PP&E sub-accounts; all four lines and amounts correct.

int_19_service_revenue_cash.reason: Revenue from rendering of services is equivalent to Revenue-Service revenue; amount 25,500 correct.

int_20_service_revenue_credit.reason: Trade receivables and Revenue from rendering of services match expected; amount 31,500 correct.

int_21_rd_expense.reason: R&D expense matches; Cash and cash equivalents is equivalent to Cash-chequing; amount 50,000 correct.

int_22_compound_sale_with_tax.reason: All six lines semantically match with correct amounts: Cash, Trade receivables, Cost of sales, Revenue, Tax liabilities, and Inventories.

int_23_split_electricity.reason: Manufacturing overhead is semantically equivalent to Work in process-Manufacturing overhead for factory electricity; Utilities expense and Credit card payable match; amounts correct.

int_24_advertising.reason: Exact match: Dr Advertising expense 22,000, Cr Cash 22,000.

int_25_building_purchase_allocation.reason: Actual uses Trade payables for the 4,500,000 deferred purchase installment instead of Other payables; a deferred purchase consideration is not a standard trade payable.

int_26a_payroll_recognition.reason: Actual breaks withholdings into 4 sub-accounts totaling 7,750 (equivalent to Statutory withholdings payable); WIP and salary expense debits semantically match; net cash 37,250 correct.

int_26b_payroll_remittance.reason: Actual itemizes each component but aggregates correctly: liability debits total 7,750, employer expense debits total 6,300, cash credit 14,050.

int_28_promotional_literature.reason: Exact match: Dr Advertising expense 7,000, Cr Cash 7,000.

int_29_security_deposit_received.reason: Tenant deposits payable is equivalent to Rental deposits received; amount 25,000 correct.

int_30_short_term_loan_advance.reason: Short-term loans receivable matches; Cash and cash equivalents is equivalent to Cash-chequing; amount 2,000,000 correct.

int_31_vehicle_nonrecoverable_tax.reason: Actual uses Trade payables instead of Other payables for the 3-month dealer payment plan; a dealer financing arrangement is not a standard trade payable.

int_hard_01a_note_derecognition.reason: Correct derecognition treatment; amounts differ by only $0.16 rounding; Losses on note discounting is equivalent to Loss on derecognition; Notes receivable is acceptable for the note form of the original trade receivable.

int_hard_01b_note_collateralized.reason: Correct collateralized borrowing treatment; minor $0.16 rounding difference; Interest expense and Short-term borrowings match expected.

int_hard_02a_investment_fvtpl.reason: Investments-FVTPL is equivalent to Financial assets at FVTPL; Professional fees expense is equivalent to Investment transaction costs; amounts correct.

int_hard_02b_investment_fvoci.reason: Investments-FVOCI is equivalent to Financial assets at FVOCI; transaction costs correctly capitalized at 3,100,000.

int_hard_02c_investment_equity_method.reason: Investments-equity method is equivalent to Investment in associate; transaction costs correctly capitalized at 3,100,000.

int_hard_16a_rent_prepaid.reason: Prepaid expenses is equivalent to Prepaid rent; Cash and cash equivalents is equivalent to Cash-chequing; amount 24,000 correct.

int_hard_16b_rent_expense.reason: Occupancy expense is semantically equivalent to Rent expense for office lease payments; amount 24,000 correct.

int_hard_27a_meal_overtime.reason: Exact match: Dr Employee benefits expense 125, Cr Credit card payable 125.

int_hard_27b_meal_meeting.reason: Exact match: Dr Meeting expense 125, Cr Credit card payable 125.

int_hard_27c_meal_entertainment.reason: Exact match: Dr Entertainment expense 125, Cr Credit card payable 125.

int_hard_27d_meal_factory.reason: Credit side uses Accrued liabilities instead of Credit card payable; the payment was explicitly by corporate credit card so Credit card payable is the correct specific liability account.

int_hard_32a_grocery_entertainment.reason: Actual splits HST as recoverable Tax assets 120 with expense at 1,200 instead of bundling full 1,320 as Entertainment expense; also uses Accrued liabilities instead of Credit card payable.

int_hard_32b_grocery_breakroom.reason: Actual splits HST as recoverable Tax assets 120 with expense at 1,200 instead of bundling full 1,320 as Employee benefits expense; also uses Trade payables instead of Credit card payable.
